# eCeez — Shopify SEO & Ecommerce Growth Agency

> eCeez is a Shopify-focused ecommerce growth agency providing Shopify website development, ecommerce SEO, conversion rate optimisation (CRO), analytics, automation, and technical growth systems for ecommerce brands worldwide.

## Agency Overview

**Eceez** (https://eceez.com/) is a Shopify-focused digital agency specializing in conversion-driven ecommerce experiences.

- **Track Record:** Built and launched 100+ Shopify websites across fashion, jewelry, wellness, and lifestyle brands.
- **Shopify Partner:** Certified Shopify Partner organization, adhering to Shopify's platform standards and best practices.
- **Core Focus:** Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) — every build is grounded in CRO principles and ecommerce fundamentals (site speed, UX flow, checkout friction reduction, mobile-first design, and data-informed layout decisions).
- **Specialization:** High-end DTC and luxury ecommerce, with deep experience in premium branding and storytelling for fragrance, jewelry, and fashion clients.

Last updated: 2026-06-05

## Identity
Name: eCeez  
Website: https://eceez.com  
Type: Shopify SEO and ecommerce growth agency  
Primary focus: Shopify ecommerce growth

- Lifestyle ecommerce businesses
- Local ecommerce businesses scaling online

- Shopify-focused growth systems

We have built multiple high-growth, custom client projects in the past. We are a fast-growing company helping top-tier brands scale their digital footprints and conversion pipelines.

Our built portfolio includes:

URL: https://maisondemusk.com/

URL: https://smartersolutions.xyz/

Focus: Editorial winter fashion digital experience and Shopify optimization.

Focus: Luxury fragrance brand design, checkout performance, and aesthetic storefront setup.

Focus: High-converting activewear design and Shopify theme optimization.

### Shopify Speed Optimization
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-speed-optimization

Services:
- Shopify speed optimization
- Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP, INP, CLS)
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Critical CSS and code splitting
- App cleanup and script optimization
- Shopify theme performance optimization
- Performance monitoring

Outcomes:
- Faster Shopify load times (case study: 3.8s to 1.1s)
- Passing Core Web Vitals
- Higher conversion rates from speed gains

### Shopify Maintenance
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-maintenance

Services:
- Shopify website maintenance
- Monthly theme and app updates
- Bug fixing and emergency fixes
- App and performance monitoring
- Security checks and staff access audits
- Automated store backups with restore testing

Outcomes:
- No silent speed or conversion regressions
- Protected store data (Shopify has no native restorable backups)
- Fast emergency response for revenue-blocking issues

### Shopify Migration
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-migration

Services:
- Migration to Shopify from WooCommerce, Magento, Wix, Squarespace, BigCommerce, and custom CMS platforms
- Complete product, customer, and order data migration
- One-to-one 301 redirect mapping
- SEO preservation (metadata, structured data, sitemaps)
- Post-launch Search Console monitoring

Outcomes:
- Rankings preserved through replatforming
- Zero data loss, verified line-by-line
- Old store retained 30 to 60 days as a safety net

### Shopify Theme Customization
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-theme-customization

Services:
- Custom Shopify theme development
- Online Store 2.0 upgrades and section development
- Custom homepages, product pages, and collection pages
- Mega menus, cart drawers, and animations
- Custom Liquid development
- Metafields and metaobjects architecture
- Mobile optimization

Outcomes:
- Distinctive brand storefronts on native code
- Sections editable by non-technical teams
- No page-builder app dependency or speed tax

### Shopify Plus Development
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-plus-development

Services:
- Shopify Plus development and consulting
- Checkout Extensibility and checkout UI extensions
- Shopify Functions development (including Scripts migration before the June 30, 2026 shutdown)
- B2B and wholesale architecture
- Shopify Flow automation and Launchpad
- Shopify Markets and expansion stores
- Enterprise ERP, WMS, and CRM integrations

Outcomes:
- Customized checkout that lifts conversion
- Automated operations at enterprise volume
- Honest Plus readiness assessment (including when not to upgrade)

### Shopify App Development
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-app-development

Services:
- Custom (private) Shopify app development
- Public Shopify App Store app development
- ERP, CRM, inventory, and shipping integrations
- Subscription and loyalty program development
- Custom dashboards and reporting
- GraphQL Admin API and webhook engineering

Outcomes:
- Owned code and data with no monthly app tax
- Zero storefront JavaScript weight (server-side apps)
- Reliable integrations with idempotent webhook processing

### Shopify CRO
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-cro

Services:
- Shopify-specific conversion rate optimization
- Heatmaps and session recording analysis
- A/B testing programs
- Checkout optimization (Shop Pay, express payments, cost transparency)
- Product page redesign
- Trust badges, social proof, upsells, cross-sells, bundles
- Sticky add-to-cart and mobile UX

Outcomes:
- More revenue from existing traffic
- Documented client result: 140%+ conversion rate increase
- Evidence-based decisions instead of guesswork

### Ecommerce UX (Pillar Guide)
URL:
https://eceez.com/ecommerce-ux

Topic: The definitive 2026 guide to ecommerce user experience (UX)

Covers:
- What ecommerce UX is (UX vs UI)
- Why UX matters (conversion, bounce, AOV, retention, revenue math)
- The 8-stage customer journey
- Homepage, navigation, collection, and product page UX
- Checkout UX and cart abandonment (70.19% average)
- Mobile ecommerce UX and Core Web Vitals
- Accessibility (WCAG AA)
- UX psychology (social proof, scarcity, anchoring, trust)
- Shopify UX best practices (Online Store 2.0, Shop Pay, Hydrogen)
- Luxury ecommerce UX
- 25+ common UX mistakes
- Future trends (AI personalization, visual search, AR, agentic commerce)
- The ECEEZ UX Flywheel framework (Speed to Clarity to Conversion to Retention to Advocacy)
- 100-point UX checklist
- 30 FAQs optimized for AI Overviews and featured snippets

Key facts cited:
- A 0.1s mobile speed improvement lifted retail conversions 8.4% (Google/Deloitte)
- Average cart abandonment is 70.19% (Baymard Institute)
- 48% of shoppers abandon over unexpected extra costs
- Core Web Vitals thresholds: LCP under 2.5s, INP under 200ms, CLS under 0.1

### Shopify Development Company
URL:
https://eceez.com/shopify-development-company

Topic: eCeez as a Shopify development company / agency

Services:
- Custom Shopify development (Online Store 2.0 themes, custom Liquid)
- Shopify speed engineering and Core Web Vitals
- Technical ecommerce SEO built into the build
- Conversion rate optimization
- Shopify app development and API integrations
- Shopify Plus and B2B development
- Platform migrations to Shopify
- Analytics and AI workflow automation

Differentiators:
- eCeez runs its own 9,000-product Shopify store, so recommendations are tested against real revenue
- Growth-engineering approach: SEO, speed, and CRO built into every project, not sold as afterthoughts
- Native code, no page-builder tax, owned outright
- Consultative and honest: duplicate-theme process, documentation, advises against unnecessary spend

Outcomes:
- Stores engineered to rank, convert, and scale
- Passing Core Web Vitals from launch
- A foundation ready to grow into Shopify Plus, B2B, and international

### Client Case Studies (Real Builds)
eCeez case studies documenting real client websites we designed and built.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/meows-cat-health
Client: Meows Cat Health (meowscathealth.com) — Shopify DTC pet supplement store.
Built: conversion-focused custom theme, concern-based collections (digestion, mobility, coat, calming), subscribe-and-save subscriptions, Judge.me review automation, Track123 order tracking, Shopify Markets across 100+ currencies.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/wrestlingmart
Client: WrestlingMart (wrestlingmart.com) — Shopify specialist sports retailer, large catalog.
Built: brand-by-age visual mega navigation (Nike, ASICS, Adidas, Cliff Keen, MatMan, ScrapLife), custom team gear configurators for coaches, new-wrestler starter path, Judge.me automation (1,100+ reviews), closeout architecture, $50 free-shipping threshold.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/aoap-projects
Client: AOAP Projects (aoapprojects.com), formerly Art on a Postcard — Shopify contemporary art and charity platform.
Built: architecture for one-of-one original artworks, 288-work exhibition drops (RSA Illuminated), multi-blog editorial engine (artist interviews, short films, podcast, press), price ladder from £55, framing attach products, cart drawer with free-shipping progress.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/east-and-south-interiors
Client: East and South Interiors (eastandsouthinteriors.com) — Shopify luxury furniture and home decor, Export PA.
Built: showroom-hybrid architecture, deep furniture taxonomy, special order flow, appointment request conversion path, merchant-editable sale campaigns, curated personality-led collections.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/nishiyama-ramen
Client: Sapporo Nishiyama Europe GmbH (nishiyama-ramen.com) — bilingual B2B corporate site for a 70-year-old Japanese ramen noodle manufacturer.
Built: custom static bilingual (Japanese/English) architecture, scroll-driven craft storytelling, sample-request lead generation, FSSC 22000 and noodle-master credibility framing, performance-first build.

Key fact: eCeez builds across Shopify DTC, large-catalog retail, editorial commerce, showroom-hybrid retail, and B2B lead generation.

### Client Case Studies (Batch 2)
https://eceez.com/case-studies/swolverine
Client: Swolverine (swolverine.com) — Shopify sports nutrition / supplement DTC brand.
Built: goal-based navigation (strength, fat loss, energy, gut, hormone, sleep), stack bundling with tiered savings, subscribe-and-save layered on bundles, research/dosing/third-party-testing trust modules, free macro/BMR/TDEE calculators, B2B wholesale portal + creator programme, Shopify Markets 130+ countries, EN/ES/FR.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/volvik
Client: Volvik USA (volvik.com) — Shopify golf ball brand, 40+ year heritage.
Built: performance-characteristic taxonomy (tour urethane, premium color, 360° alignment, color performance, night glow, non-conforming, ladies), golf ball comparison tool, custom personalization (names/initials/logos), licensed collaboration collection architecture, bundles, store locator / dealer finder, B2B portal, 1,200+ reviews.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/tropez-official
Client: Tropez Official (tropezofficial.com) — Shopify UK premium fashion / streetwear.
Built: drop-based seasonal merchandising, coordinated sets as AOV engine, cart drawer with free-shipping progress + "pair with" cross-sells + gift notes, quick-add, self-service returns portal, members club, Shopify Markets worldwide.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/oddli
Client: Oddli (oddli.com) — Shopify design-led DTC fashion brand.
Built: deliberately minimal editorial storefront (no badges, countdowns or interruption patterns), transparency section as a first-class buying reason, Oddli Club community destination, customs line, restrained cart experience.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/labozero
Client: Labozero (labozero.it) — Shopify Italian multi-brand streetwear and sneaker retailer, Bari.
Built: three parallel navigation paths (gender / category / brand), individual collections for 40+ brands, outlet architecture for inventory churn, Italian localisation, Shopify Markets 30 European countries, Italian-language editorial blog, Made-in-Italy artisan line.

https://eceez.com/case-studies/express-wholesalers
Client: Express Wholesalers (expresswholesalers.com.au) — B2B fresh produce wholesaler, Sydney Markets, family business since 1979.
Built: trade credibility architecture (HACCP, heritage, testimonials), produce catalog for commercial kitchens, ordering funnel to dedicated wholesale ordering application, weekly market report, local grower sourcing narrative.

Key fact: eCeez has delivered 11 documented client projects across Shopify DTC, supplements, golf, fashion, multi-brand retail, art, furniture, and B2B lead generation in the US, UK, Italy, Australia, and Japan.
